title: PokéFactory Alpha
description: A Cobblemon PokéFactory inspired modpack that adds more biomes, Pokemon (duh), Create, Farmer's Delight and many more familiar mods.
body:
# Experience the best of Cobblemon and modded Minecraft! This modpack is heavily inspired by [Cobblemon PokéFactory](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-pokefactory). (and maybe also Satisfactory) In this modpack, you can build an automated PokéBall farm, harvest a variety of crops, make delicious food for your virtual tastebuds, catch Pokémon to fill out your CobbleDex and more! (Formerly Project PokéFactory) # Which mods are included? The modlist is very long, with the modcount being over 200. You can check the modlist below for a full list. However the core mods of the modpack are: - **Cobblemon** - the perfect Pokemon mod for Minecraft, PokeFactory is designed for and around Cobblemon - **Create** - the partner to Cobblemon, Create is the basis for the majority of the other mods, automate everything, rival Silph Co, and never have to mine anything again - **Applied Energistics 2** - sick of rotation? Turn it into energy, AE2 complements Create in every way and provides the main storage methods for PokeFactory - **Farmer's Delight** - PokeFactory isn't just for players who want to build huge factories, with Farmer's Delights we offer the peaceful Pokemon Homestead of your dreams (The list above was taken directly from the Cobblemon PokeFactory modrinth page, as this modpack aims to replicate it with additional tweaks.) Additionally, this modpack uses [Cobblemon's Official Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-fabric) as a base, so the mods from that modpack are included aswell. # Performance The performance for this modpack isn't exactly a kitchen sink optimization pack, however I, like any other sane developer like to have good performance. At the moment, it runs well enough. If I had to give it a score, I'd say it's about 7/10. # What to expect in the future? Generally more extensions for existing mods, QoL improvements, optimization and more configs for existing mods. Here's a list of things that will be included in updates to the modpack: - Further optimization - More configurations for existing mods - Music update - QoL updates - Documentation page # Notes The description for this modpack reflects the state of the latest version of the modpack ONLY. Also, it's recommended to put the modpack onto an SSD if you're impatient. Sometimes saving your singleplayer world can take a long time on harddisks. Bootup and world loading may take a while, I currently don't have any idea what's causing it other than a general "It's probably loading a lot of mods". The assets for this modpack are under construction. # About When starting the modpack, you'll notice that there are an overwhelming amount of controls and information that you may not know about. This is what this section is supposed to provide. I like to imagine that [**this**](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mYworLucNrY) music plays when players read this page. ## Controls This is the part of the section that explains the controls. ### Cobblemon - **M** - Open Pokemon Party List / Summary - **R** - Throw out Pokemon - Use Potions / Items - Right Click on Pokemon during battles - **Arrow Keys** - Cycle selected Pokemon ### Guilds (Odyssey Claims and Allies) - **F6** - Open Claim Map - **Guild Commands** (Doesn't have a GUI) - Type "**/guild**" (not to be confused with "/guilds") - **F9** - Open Guild Chat ### Backpacks (Sophisticated Backpacks) - **H** - Open Backpack ### Xaero's World Map - **J** - Open Map - **V** - Create Waypoint ### Zoom - **C** - Zoom ### Simple Voice Chat - **N** - Unmute Mic ### Advancements I recommend that you use the achievements/advancements page if you are looking for a sense of progression. - **L** - Open Advancements Page ### Vein Mining (Diggus Maximus) - Hold **~** / **"** (on some keyboard layouts) + **Left Mouse Button** - Vein Mine ### Parkour (FastMove) - **Shift** while running - Slide - **Jump** in the **middle** of a **slide** - Slide Jump - **Hold SPACE** While hugging a wall - Wall-Slide ## Server Hosting As for server hosting, you can remove the following mods: - Essential and simply run the default fabric server with all of its configs. ## Resources Some mods in this modpack have a lot of mechanics to learn about even on their own, hence the section. ### Create - [Dejojotheawesome's Create Tutorial](https://youtu.be/NQIAvYO_Ras?t=103) ### Tinker's Construct - [Tinker's Construct's Official Documentation](https://slimeknights.github.io/docs/gameplay/tinkers-construct-3/) # Credits - [Cobblemon Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-fabric) - [Mercurium](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mercurium) - [Cobblemon PokéFactory](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-pokefactory) - [BANanaDEV](https://modrinth.com/user/BANanaDEV) (for helping with some optimizations)
